title: S2-4-141_T0000014.WAV
author: Ey, Elodie
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
User: Elodie Ey - email: eye@igbmc.fr 
Mouse: S2-4-141 (group cohort 2010) - Sex: female - Strain: ProSAP1/Shank2 - Genotype: +/+ - Treatment: none 
Protocol: Female-female interactions (30 min - 4 min; no isolation) - File number: 1 
Females were housed in groups of two to four mice per cage. The tested mouse was left 30 min for habituation in the test cage (Plexiglas, 50×25×30 cm; 100 lx; clean sawdust bedding; sound-proof chamber). After this time, an unfamiliar C57BL/6 mouse of the same sex was introduced. The two animals were allowed to freely interact for 4 min. 

 Experiment: female-female Shank2 (no isolation) 
Date experiment: 2010-10-19 
Temperature: 21-23°C 
Light cycle: day 
Microphone: Avisoft CM16/CMPA 
Acquisition hardware: Avisoft UltraSoundGate 416-200 
Acquisition software: Avisoft-Recorder 3.4.2 
Sampling frequency: 300 
Bit depth: 16 

 Laboratory: Institut Pasteur 
25, rue du Dr Roux 
75015 Paris 
France
